videos.title: The agent-ready web: Simplify user actions with WebMCP — Tara Agyemang, Google
videos.summary: This video introduces WebMCP, a proposed web standard that transforms websites into clean, high-performance APIs for AI agents, replacing clunky screen-scraping. It shows developers how to make websites 'agent-ready' with practical demos of AI navigating sites and completing tasks. This is essential viewing for anyone building web applications for the future of AI-driven browsing.

timestamps.topic: Introduction to the WebMCP protocol
Practical use cases for WebMCP
Declarative vs Imperative APIs

videos.title: How to Quit Your Job (and Find Work You Actually Love)
videos.summary: This video offers a grounded guide on transitioning from a traditional, high-prestige career to a self-directed path without needing a flawless blueprint. By exploring the concept of the 'pathless path,' the speakers provide practical steps to align your daily work with personal energy rather than societal expectations. It is a valuable watch for anyone feeling unfulfilled in a corporate role and seeking a realistic, step-by-step roadmap to make a change.

timestamps.topic: Understanding the 'prestige game' trap in career choices
Analyzing the shift from learning to merely earning
How to pragmatically run your financial numbers before taking a leap

videos.title: Kaedah baru bayar zakat?
videos.summary: This video introduces a new automated way for ASNB investors to pay zakat directly from their dividends using the myASNB app's 'Zakat Khultah' feature. It simplifies the Al-Mustaghallat calculation method, explaining how you can seamlessly fulfill your religious obligations while keeping your investment compounding. It is a highly practical guide for Malaysian Muslim investors seeking to automate their wealth management.

timestamps.topic: Explanation of Class A vs Class B zakat options
How net dividend is calculated after zakat deduction
Step-by-step activation of Zakat Khultah in the myASNB app

videos.title: Saham patuh syariah selamat?
videos.summary: This video offers eye-opening insights into the complexities of Shariah-compliant investing, revealing why popular brands like Apple or Maybank might surprise you with their compliance status. It teaches viewers that a 'Shariah-compliant' label isn't always straightforward, making it an essential watch for anyone wanting to align their financial portfolio with their ethical values.

timestamps.topic: Shariah-compliant companies based in Tel Aviv
The paradox of Maybank's Shariah compliance status
Why global tech giants aim for Shariah compliance

videos.title: How To Make Du’a For Your Critics | Dr. Omar Suleiman
videos.summary: This video highlights the profound humility of Umar ibn al-Khattab, who welcomed correction and feared Allah deeply, contrasting his attitude with our modern reluctance to accept advice. It serves as a powerful reminder of the spiritual benefit of embracing sincere counsel and self-improvement.

timestamps.topic: Umar's appreciation for those who pointed out his faults
How Umar reacted with humility when told to fear Allah

videos.title: Why Can't Anyone Answer Questions About the Business? — Garrett Galow, WorkOS
videos.summary: This talk introduces WorkOS Studio, an AI-powered internal workspace that lets non-technical teams query databases and build custom dashboards using natural language. It demonstrates how to bypass traditional engineering bottlenecks by letting AI safely write and validate database queries on the fly. It is a highly practical case study on leveraging LLMs to dramatically boost internal company productivity.

timestamps.topic: The friction in traditional data querying workflows
Architectural breakdown of the AI-powered Studio tool
Key design patterns for making database LLM agents reliable

videos.title: Secret to Consistent Worship | Dr. Omar Suleiman
videos.summary: This video highlights the balance between discipline and motivation in faith, using a prophetic supplication to show how to maintain spiritual consistency. It provides actionable insight into staying committed to worship even when personal motivation is low.

timestamps.topic: Discipline vs. motivation in spiritual consistency
The Prophet's supplication for firmness and guidance
Balancing steadfastness with the pursuit of higher goals

videos.title: Malaysia ada logo halal paling dicari di dunia. MAMEE ada impian yang sama
videos.summary: This video explores how Malaysian businesses can bypass rigid global corporate structures to make agile, community-focused decisions. It highlights an ambitious vision to leverage Malaysia's respected JAKIM halal certification to build a world-leading food brand.

timestamps.topic: The vision of a global halal food leader from Malaysia
Leveraging the JAKIM Halal certification as a competitive edge

videos.title: How to Keep Shipping When You Walk Away from Your Desk — Zack Proser, WorkOS
videos.summary: This presentation is a must-watch for developers feeling overwhelmed by the rapid influx of powerful AI coding tools, offering a fresh perspective on avoiding burnout. The core takeaway is that the developer's attention—not the AI agent—is the ultimate bottleneck, and we must build smart verification gates and asynchronous workflows to sustain our productivity.

timestamps.topic: The trap of stacking too many AI agents
The enabling stack for developer balance
The 'shower principle' and remote control workflow

videos.title: Are You Sincere? | Snapshots with Imam Tom Facchine
videos.summary: This video provides practical guidance on measuring personal sincerity in faith through self-reflection. Viewers will learn key indicators of sincerity, such as performing secret acts of worship and handling criticism constructively, to focus on the spiritual quality of their actions.

timestamps.topic: The value of secret acts of worship
Analyzing your response to praise and criticism
Prioritizing the quality of deeds over quantity

videos.title: Astro gagal siar World Cup, tanda kejatuhan gergasi TV Malaysia?
videos.summary: Learn from the strategic missteps of a Malaysian entertainment giant. This detailed business and financial breakdown of Astro offers invaluable, real-world lessons on market disruption, changing consumer behavior, and the critical importance of digital adaptability.

videos.title: #104 | Is The Unity Government Working? | Idris & Leon Jala
videos.summary: Gain critical economic foresight with corporate turnaround expert Idris Jala as he dissects Malaysia's current governance performance. Understanding these national policies is vital for young professionals navigating local market opportunities and evaluating the trajectory of the country's business landscape.

videos.title: #105 | Building Malaysia's Largest Stroke Rehab Network (Janet Yeo)
videos.summary: Ever wondered what it truly takes to build a significant, impactful venture from the ground up right here in Malaysia? This episode dives deep into Janet Yeo's journey, offering invaluable lessons on entrepreneurship, resilience, and scaling a network that truly serves a critical need in our community. Get ready to be inspired and learn practical strategies for making your mark.

videos.title: #103 | Malaysia's RM300K EV Policy | Idris & Leon Jala
videos.summary: How will Malaysia's significant EV policy impact your financial planning, investment opportunities, and even the future of technology in our country? This discussion with Idris and Leon Jala breaks down the economic implications of the RM300K EV policy, offering insights vital for an Islamic financial advocate and any forward-thinking professional. Don't miss this deep dive into a policy set to reshape our automotive and economic landscape.

videos.title: The not-so-rare world of rare diseases | Zhenghong Gao | TEDxApex
videos.summary: Dive into the overlooked yet surprisingly common world of rare diseases and discover the profound impact of dedicated advocacy and scientific pursuit. This talk encourages a mindset of empathy and persistent problem-solving, skills invaluable for a junior engineer looking to tackle complex challenges or anyone seeking to make a difference in niche, critical areas. It's a reminder that even the 'rare' can hold universal lessons.
